records.m_Talk_ENG: The majority of the people here are people who have been eaten by the whale in the past.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The majority of the people here are people who have been eaten by the whale in the past.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The majority of the people here are people who have been eaten by the whale in the past.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then does that mean... that it's extracting memories from the dead and watching them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then does that mean... that it's extracting memories from the dead and watching them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then does that mean... that it's extracting memories from the dead and watching them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is the C.O. even doing this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is the C.O. even doing this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is the C.O. even doing this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>To become complete.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>To become complete.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>To become complete.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's replaying the memories of those whom it swallowed to maintain its self-awareness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's replaying the memories of those whom it swallowed to maintain its self-awareness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's replaying the memories of those whom it swallowed to maintain its self-awareness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until it reaches its desired ideal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until it reaches its desired ideal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until it reaches its desired ideal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yikes! A bullet just flew past me! It'll be dangerous if I get hit by it, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yikes! A bullet just flew past me! It'll be dangerous if I get hit by it, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yikes! A bullet just flew past me! It'll be dangerous if I get hit by it, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You won't get hurt, but they will know we're here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You won't get hurt, but they will know we're here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You won't get hurt, but they will know we're here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've confirmed it several times already...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've confirmed it several times already...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've confirmed it several times already...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? It's them again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? It's them again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? It's them again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How big is the Society?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How big is the Society?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How big is the Society?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are already lurking around the city. I think they are planning to voluntarily get caught in the ritual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are already lurking around the city. I think they are planning to voluntarily get caught in the ritual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are already lurking around the city. I think they are planning to voluntarily get caught in the ritual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their objective is still unknown, but I assume they are trying to secure as many sacrificial offers as possible...94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their objective is still unknown, but I assume they are trying to secure as many sacrificial offers as possible...94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their objective is still unknown, but I assume they are trying to secure as many sacrificial offers as possible...94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...including us, who were sent here to stop it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...including us, who were sent here to stop it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...including us, who were sent here to stop it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Currently, the Society has blocked off the entire city entrances, including the one we used.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Currently, the Society has blocked off the entire city entrances, including the one we used.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Currently, the Society has blocked off the entire city entrances, including the one we used.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So they knew that we were coming. Was our operation leaked?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So they knew that we were coming. Was our operation leaked?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So they knew that we were coming. Was our operation leaked?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you saying that there is a traitor among our ranks?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you saying that there is a traitor among our ranks?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you saying that there is a traitor among our ranks?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't be sure. But there is no time to figure out the cause of the variable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't be sure. But there is no time to figure out the cause of the variable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't be sure. But there is no time to figure out the cause of the variable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This operation is too risky. Fall back, leaving only the minimum number of personnel and call for backup.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This operation is too risky. Fall back, leaving only the minimum number of personnel and call for backup.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This operation is too risky. Fall back, leaving only the minimum number of personnel and call for backup.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... we've already checked every possibility. If the causality calculation is off, then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... we've already checked every possibility. If the causality calculation is off, then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... we've already checked every possibility. If the causality calculation is off, then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We rescue the people first. Let's worry about stopping the ritual after.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We rescue the people first. Let's worry about stopping the ritual after.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We rescue the people first. Let's worry about stopping the ritual after.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone except those selected to stay should retreat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone except those selected to stay should retreat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone except those selected to stay should retreat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The retreating personnel should break through the siege and call Camelot for backup.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The retreating personnel should break through the siege and call Camelot for backup.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The retreating personnel should break through the siege and call Camelot for backup.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those remaining will help me evacuate the civilians.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those remaining will help me evacuate the civilians.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those remaining will help me evacuate the civilians.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, ma'am!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-whoa... she's so cool.
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-whoa... she's so cool.
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-whoa... she's so cool.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... that person is the only one that's blurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... that person is the only one that's blurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... that person is the only one that's blurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can barely tell that she's human.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can barely tell that she's human.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can barely tell that she's human.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the person next to her is you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the person next to her is you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the person next to her is you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. It's me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. It's me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. It's me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's something that happened way before Eridu... then it must be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's something that happened way before Eridu... then it must be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's something that happened way before Eridu... then it must be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not a C.O... are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not a C.O... are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not a C.O... are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Not sure if it's a good or a bad thing, but I haven't become a C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Not sure if it's a good or a bad thing, but I haven't become a C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Not sure if it's a good or a bad thing, but I haven't become a C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The surroundings are changing again...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The surroundings are changing again...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The surroundings are changing again...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are they looking at us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are they looking at us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are they looking at us?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Or is there something where we're stand
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Or is there something where we're stand
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Or is there something where we're stand
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeek! Th-they attacked us! They were real! And just turned into C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeek! Th-they attacked us! They were real! And just turned into C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeek! Th-they attacked us! They were real! And just turned into C.O.s!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think they've noticed us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think they've noticed us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think they've noticed us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, they think that we're just some impurities...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, they think that we're just some impurities...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, they think that we're just some impurities...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now do you understand why we shouldn't attract their attention?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now do you understand why we shouldn't attract their attention?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now do you understand why we shouldn't attract their attention?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say it like it's some beginner's class for dummies!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say it like it's some beginner's class for dummies!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say it like it's some beginner's class for dummies!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm asking just in case, but do you have any experience fighting C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm asking just in case, but do you have any experience fighting C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm asking just in case, but do you have any experience fighting C.O.s?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm good at running away from them...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm good at running away from them...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm good at running away from them...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's fine. Just stay close to me then, okay?
